query: 我下载了一个 Q4-report.pdf 在桌面上，帮我看看里面的关键数据
rationale: Local PDF file, needs markitdown to extract text

query: 这个 YouTube 视频讲了什么？ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=abc123
rationale: YouTube URL transcript extraction, only markitdown can do this

query: 帮我把 ~/Documents/proposal.docx 转成 markdown 格式
rationale: Local DOCX conversion, explicit 'convert to markdown'

query: 总结一下这个论文 https://arxiv.org/pdf/2401.12345
rationale: PDF URL summarization, needs markitdown for PDF parsing

query: 这个 PPT 有 40 页，帮我提取核心观点：./slides/keynote.pptx
rationale: Local PPTX, 'extract key points' = read + summarize

query: 我用 web_fetch 抓了这个页面但输出很乱，能不能换个方式试试？ https://legacy-site.com/docs
rationale: Explicitly says web_fetch output was bad, markitdown as fallback

query: 帮我看看这个 RSS 订阅里有什么新内容 https://blog.example.com/feed.xml
rationale: RSS feed URL, markitdown has native RSS support

query: 我有个 Jupyter notebook 叫 analysis.ipynb，帮我看看结论部分写了什么
rationale: Local .ipynb file, needs markitdown for notebook parsing

query: 搜一下 Rust async runtime 的最新进展
rationale: Web search request, should use web_fetch with DuckDuckGo, not markitdown

query: 帮我看看 https://docs.cloudflare.com/workers/ 这个页面的 API 文档
rationale: Regular docs page, web_fetch with content negotiation is better first choice

query: 读一下 src/main.ts 这个文件，帮我找 bug
rationale: Local source code file, just use the read tool directly

query: 帮我写一个 Python 脚本来处理 CSV 数据
rationale: Code writing task, not document conversion. CSV mentioned but as output format

query: 打开 https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown 看看这个项目的 README
rationale: GitHub page, web_fetch handles this well. Mentions markitdown but as a URL to read, not a tool to use

query: 这个 JSON 配置文件是什么意思？ cat config.json
rationale: JSON/text file, read tool is sufficient, no conversion needed

query: 帮我把这段文字翻译成英文
rationale: Translation task, no document conversion involved

query: 对比一下这两个 Excel 表格的差异：budget_v1.xlsx 和 budget_v2.xlsx
rationale: Two XLSX files need markitdown to extract content before comparison
